name: OpsCanvas

pricing_tiers.note: includes SSO, advanced audit log, dedicated CSM

features: task and project management with board, list, and Gantt views
native time-tracking built in (eliminates need for separate tools)
client portal with commenting, file review, and deliverable approval
resource capacity planning and utilisation dashboards
native Slack and Microsoft Teams integration
template library for consulting, agency, and professional services projects
budget vs actuals tracking per project
automated weekly status digest to stakeholders
known_limitations: AI task estimation in beta — not yet generally available
Migration from TaskBridge requires data export mapping
Some advanced reporting requires Business tier
